purpose: Diagnose continuous within-mask risk interactions and discover stable development hypotheses for the safe within-cell timing ceiling; never replace the parent 144-cell gate or promote a result alone.

superseded_prototype.disposition: retained on war-risk-interaction as a didactic prototype; not merged
reasons: custom Morris trajectories used clipping and produced null/nonstandard steps
target was regime-tailoring among constants rather than H_timing_safe
direct Sobol ignored stochastic simulator noise and input-dependence gates
ST-S1 was over-described as unique interaction mass
custom PRIM lacked EMA peeling/pasting and configuration-level holdout validation

target.definition: per configuration, mean over paired CRN tapes of the best safe restricted event-timed candidate minus the strongest frozen same-cell comparator; if no candidate is safe on a tape, delta is zero
not_allowed: regime-tailoring max constant minus robust constant

strata.definition: one fixed parent mask and one fixed coupling mode
strata.factor_sampling: independent uniform in log2 multiplier space inside each stratum
strata.classical_sobol_rule: allowed only within a fixed stratum with independently sampled factors; any future domain constraint or dependent factor sampling requires a new Shapley/dependent-input contract

stochastic_protocol.common_random_numbers: identical ordered tape IDs and exogenous base-stream hashes across configurations; within each fixed configuration, every policy must also reproduce the exact realized risk-event tape hash
response_records: every primary, guardrail, resource and saturation ledger
stochastic_protocol.noise_audit: estimate Monte-Carlo variance of each configuration mean and separate it from observed between-configuration variance; report the Monte-Carlo fraction
stochastic_protocol.noise_gate: a stratum with Monte-Carlo fraction >0.50 cannot be selected for QMC/Sobol from three-tape Morris evidence

phase_G1_morris.implementation: SALib 1.5.2 standard optimized Morris design and analyzer
phase_G1_morris.interpretation: mu_star ranks influence; sigma indicates nonlinearity or interaction and cannot distinguish them
phase_G1_morris.qmc_eligibility: max over factors of (mu_star - mu_star_conf95) >=0.001 on H_timing_safe, Monte-Carlo fraction <=0.50, zero risk clipping/saturation, and all safe-oracle invariants pass
phase_G1_morris.selection: execute QMC pools for at most three eligible strata, ordered by largest lower influence proxy, then parent mask order and coupling order
phase_G1_morris.no_eligible_stratum: stop the overlay; do not add trajectories or lower the threshold

phase_G2_surrogate.design: 128-point scrambled Sobol space-filling pool per frozen stratum, generated independently of Saltelli cross-sampling
phase_G2_surrogate.implementation: cross-fitted ExtraTrees mean emulator plus residual-variance emulator
phase_G2_surrogate.sample_weight: inverse estimated variance of the configuration mean, normalized and clipped to [0.1,10]
phase_G2_surrogate.failure: no Sobol indices and no PRIM box may be reported for that stratum

phase_G3_sobol.claim_limit: ST-S1 is the overlapping sum of higher-order terms involving a factor, not a unique global interaction mass and not proof that an OAT null generalizes

phase_G4_scenario_discovery.implementation: EMA Workbench 2.5.3 PRIM with peeling and pasting, wrapped in repeated configuration-level stratified holdouts
phase_G4_scenario_discovery.binary_case: H_timing_safe >=0.01 and every parent safe/resource/action/saturation gate passes

allowed_use: propose a continuous hypothesis box for a future separately frozen contract
forbidden_use: open parent validation because PRIM finds a box
claim additivity or global exhaustion from point estimates
